lines.text: I... lost? So this is what losing feels like...?
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Because I lost, I can't stop thinking about it... I see... So that's what they've been feeling all this time.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: So that's why they keep battling when they hear Peaks of Prestige. It all makes perfect sense now!
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Thank you for helping me realize all this!
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Uncle Cromer said I should hand this over to anyone who defeats me. Here, take the Nightmare Medal.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: You're the first to get it. Now, I've gotta get back to the game!
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Uncle Cromer! Aunt Agatha! Grandpa Gaferro! Wait for me!
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige
